summary: Security hardening tests (iteration 292). All 22 backend tests PASSED (100%). Verified: promo code >100% rejected, negative discount rejected, 100% discount allowed, product name 100k rejected/500 accepted, terms 600k rejected/500k accepted, login works for both super admin and tenant admin, wrong password and unknown email both return identical 401 'Invalid credentials' (timing attack fix verified), SSRF metadata IP and loopback blocked, valid webhook URL allowed. Old ALLFREE promo code (fc26c6a7) cleaned up successfully.

minor.issue: PromoCodeUpdate model is missing the cap_percentage validator. If an admin sends PUT with discount_value=150 (without sending discount_type=percentage), the 100% cap is NOT enforced on update. Only the non-negative check is present. The original PromoCodeCreate has the cap_percentage validator but PromoCodeUpdate does not.

The platform-admin-only login path (lines 565-567) does NOT perform a dummy bcrypt on unknown email. The timing attack fix was only added to _authenticate() which is used by /api/auth/partner-login. Risk is low since this endpoint only accepts platform_super_admin accounts.

action_items: Consider adding cap_percentage validator to PromoCodeUpdate model so PUT /api/admin/promo-codes/{id} also enforces <=100% for percentage discounts
Consider adding dummy bcrypt timing mitigation to /api/auth/login (no partner_code) unknown email path for completeness (minor risk since endpoint is platform_admin only)
critical_code_review_comments: PromoCodeCreate: validators correctly placed - validate_discount_value rejects negatives (both percentage and fixed), cap_percentage rejects >100% for percentage type. Pydantic mode='after' ensures proper ordering.
AdminProductCreate: name=Field(**_NAME) correctly enforces max_length=500. description_long=Field('', **_CONTENT) correctly enforces max_length=500000.

checkout.py: discount_amount = min(round_cents(...), subtotal) correctly caps discount at subtotal in all 3 checkout paths (bank-transfer, stripe, generic). total=max(0.0, ...) floors negative totals to zero.
auth.py _authenticate(): dummy bcrypt hash at line 200 prevents timing-based user enumeration on the partner-login path.
tenant.py resolve_api_key_tenant(): plaintext fallback removed, SHA-256 hash only lookup confirmed.
PromoCodeUpdate MISSING cap_percentage validator - only has non-negative check. PUT with {discount_value:150} without discount_type would not be rejected.
imports.py _sanitize_cell() correctly strips formula injection prefixes (=, +, -, @, etc.) using a prefix check and single-quote neutralization.
File size: auth.py is 1729 lines - should be considered for splitting into sub-modules (auth helpers, platform auth, partner auth, customer auth).
seed_data_creation: No persistent seed data created. All TEST_ promo codes, products, and webhooks were created and immediately cleaned up within tests. Old ALLFREE promo code (fc26c6a7-15a7-47ba-8f3c-9777afb10a8f) cleaned up.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Security hardening iteration 292 fully tested and passing. All 6 new security fixes verified: (1) Promo code validators, (2) Checkout discount capping, (3) Max-length field limits, (4) CSV formula injection sanitize in imports.py, (5) API key plaintext fallback removed in tenant.py, (6) Timing attack mitigation in auth.py. Test file: /app/backend/tests/test_security_hardening_292.py. Key gap: PromoCodeUpdate missing cap_percentage validator - PUT can still set >100% discount. mayank@automateaccounts.com account confirmed unlocked (1 failed attempt, no lockout).
passed_tests: Valid 20% promo code created by tenant admin
Valid fixed $10 promo code created by tenant admin
Old ALLFREE promo code (fc26c6a7) cleaned up
Normal product name accepted by tenant admin
Super admin login with valid credentials (200)
Tenant admin partner-login with valid credentials (200)
Wrong password for known email returns 401 with 'Invalid credentials'
Known email and unknown email return identical error message (anti-enumeration)
